title: neottopteris orientalis
intro: Neottopteris orientalis is a species of fern, specifically a type of climbing fern, native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Neottopteris orientalis include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Neottopteris orientalis are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
